title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 5–8, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Nami’s role with Arlong becomes harder to understand as loyalty, fear, and survival overlap.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: He's trying to build his own nation...!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: So then, he's gonna turn all of East Blue in to His "Fishmen Empire"?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: But that would include my hometown too!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: All we can do is quietly sit still and endure it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: is a clear sign of rebelliion,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: the cause of any unrest and disturbance in my lands.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And so, to make sure that there aren't any more rebels like you,

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: I'll kill you to show the other villagers what happens to rebels!

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
